caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard sits in a recording studio, wearing black over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt featuring a small logo on the left chest that reads "Sloan Collective" and "Bespoke Studio." He is positioned in front of a silver condenser microphone mounted on a black boom arm. The background consists of dark grey acoustic foam panels with a ribbed texture. As the scene progresses, the man looks toward someone off-camera to his right, his facial expression shifting from a neutral, attentive gaze to a slight smile, and finally to a wide, open-mouthed laugh. Throughout the sequence, he remains seated and stationary, with the movement centered on his facial expressions as he interacts with an unseen person.
